LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER WADE ROBERTSON'S MOTION FOR PEREMPTORY WRIT OF MANDATE. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER WADE ROBERTSON'S MOTION FOR PEREMPTORY WRIT OF MANDATE.
APPEARANCES: DAVID A. CARRILLO, DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL (OFFICE OF THE ATTORNEY GENERAL, 510.622.2215) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. THERE ARE NO OTHER APPEARANCES. MR. JACKSON'S OFFICE TELEPHONED THE COURT AND INDICATED THAT THEY WILL BE SUBMITTING ON THE TENTATIVE RULING.
RULING: COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. THE UNDISPUTED EVIDENCE IS THAT THE COMMUNICATION WAS NOT SUBSTANTIVE AND THE COMMUNICATION FALLS WITHIN GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 11430.10(B). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM/PB) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
